text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After picking up some training supplies at the
shopping district, Mejiro Ardan and I are on our
way back.
choice_data_list: Thanks for coming shopping with me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. These are all things I use regularly
during training, and besides, I'm sure you're very
busy, so it's my pleasure to be of assistance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Oh? Isn't that...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh my, a raffle!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It's been such a long time since I last saw one!
And it's quite an old-school raffle machine, isn't
it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suddenly remember that we received a
complimentary raffle ticket when I purchased the
training supplies earlier.
choice_data_list: Do you want to have a go at the raffle?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: R-really?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: But the ticket came with something that you bought.
choice_data_list:
Well, this shopping trip was for your benefit,
too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. Well, when you put it that way, I find
myself quite tempted to see whether I can win.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Greetings, young lady! Care to try your luck?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes please, I'd like to have a go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan gives the raffle machine a powerful
spin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
choice_data_list: You did it, Ardan!
You did it, Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Um... Are the grand prizes won quite frequently?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Not at all, young lady! The grand prize is called the grand prize precisely because of its rarity!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh yes, of course. My apologies, I was simply so
stunned that I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Even so... is it really all right for me to accept the
grand prize?
choice_data_list: This must be karma for all your good deeds.
This must be karma for all your good deeds.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: In that case... I'm equally honored and thankful.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Considering that I've been defying fate itself in
an effort to leave my mark on the present... I
never expected to receive such a blessing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Your phrasing earlier implied that this win was my
doing, Trainer, but the raffle ticket was yours to
begin with.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As such, this coupon... should be left in your
hands, don't you think?
choice_data_list:
I don't mind holding onto it, but it belongs to
you.

I don't mind holding onto it, but it belongs to
you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Well, since I won the grand prize using your raffle
ticket, Trainer, I was thinking that it might be
best if the two of us discussed how best to use it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
In this moment, I'm pinning absolutely everything
on racing. I expect I'd struggle to spare the time
and mental space needed to enjoy a vacation.
choice_data_list: All right, I understand.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
When the time is suitable... let us discuss how
best to utilize this travel coupon.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The first prize?! To think that I'd have such luck
playing a raffle on a whim...
choice_data_list: You did it, Ardan!
You did it, Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
All things considered, though, this is a very
generous serving. And it's not simply an enormous
portion either—it's been cooked to perfection as
well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I wonder how one might best savor this dish.
choice_data_list: It looks delicious.
It looks delicious.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... would you like to partake of this
hamburger steak with me later?
choice_data_list: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Well, this all started with the raffle ticket you
received with your shopping. I merely used the
ticket.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: One could say that we earned this prize together, so it follows that we should also enjoy it together...
choice_data_list: In that case, I think I will partake.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes, I insist.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
With that decided, let's purchase some sauce and
garnishes on our way back.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: This meal's going to be a special treat, so I'd very much like to present it as nicely as possible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later on, Mejiro Ardan and I enjoy the
mouthwateringly delicious deluxe carrot
hamburger steak together.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I did it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Honestly, I never even considered that I
might win something.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Delighted as I am, the sheer number of carrots
here is simply overwhelming.
choice_data_list: Why don't you share them with your friends?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh, of course! What a splendid idea.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
These carrots here are for you, Trainer, since you
obtained the ticket. And these carrots are mine,
as I won the prize. I shall give the rest of them to
my friends.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm thinking of making a meal out of our
combined share of carrots. What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Do any recipes that use carrots come to mind?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That night, after thoroughly enjoying the carrot
dish Mejiro Ardan makes, I feel greatly revitalized
and ready to take on tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I won something.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
What a lovely carrot. One can tell it was grown
with painstaking care and attention. In fact, I
expect it would taste quite wonderful as is...
choice_data_list: Why not eat it right now then?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Wouldn't that be a little uncouth?
choice_data_list: Just think of it as a quick snack.
Just think of it as a quick snack.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. "A quick snack," you say?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I must admit, that does sound fun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, of course. Seeing as one doesn't get to see a
carrot of this caliber every day, would you like to
share it with me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, on our way back, Mejiro Ardan and I
enjoy the delicious carrot together.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh... It's a consolation prize...
choice_data_list: That's a shame...
That's a shame...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Only receiving the consolation prize is...
unexpectedly disheartening.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I suppose one can't help but feel suddenly
optimistic as one pulls the raffle lever. This has
been a great learning experience.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for allowing me to partake in the
raffle, Trainer. Considering how rare an
opportunity this was, I was hoping to win
something we might share...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for having failed to make that a
reality.
choice_data_list: It's totally fine. You don't have to apologize.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Shall we head back?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she doesn't say or show it, I can tell
Mejiro Ardan feels a little dejected...
